issues.summary: TPM2 LUKS unlock failed at boot
issues.detail:
systemd-cryptsetup could not unseal the LUKS key from the TPM, so you had to type your passphrase. Most common cause: a sealed PCR value (usually PCR 7 — Secure Boot policy) changed since enrollment.

Recent journal lines:
Failed to unseal secret using TPM2: Operation not permitted
Failed to unseal secret using TPM2: Operation not permitted

Click Fix to re-seal the TPM2 keyslot against the current PCR values. You will be asked for your LUKS passphrase.
